name: multi-field-d1-lipschitz-refined
description: Wave 3 Phase 3 (6/N) — Tier D1 + sub-brick refinement combined. D1's per-brick directional Lipschitz is unconditional (always wired into marchRay's step divisor); this fixture additionally enables `subBrickRefinement: true` (interval trigger, threshold 2.0, maxDepth 1) so the refinement-on path also exercises the D1 step-size scaling at sub-brick granularity. Populate writes Bernstein coefficients for both parent bricks AND any sub-brick children allocated by `applyPerAtomSubdivision`. Visual: should match `multi-field-sub-brick-refinement-on` near-identically, with potentially cleaner thin-feature edges from D1's tighter per-direction L bounds.

commands: window.__canarySetDisplayState({ render: { subBrickRefinement: true, subBrickTrigger: 'interval', subBrickThreshold: 2.0, subBrickMaxDepth: 1 } })
